description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, metallic column rising from a square base, supporting a horizontal crossbar at the top. At each end of the crossbar, there is a spherical lamp head with a glossy white globe encased in a dark, circular band, giving the fixture a modern and symmetrical appearance. The post itself is a muted olive or dark bronze color, with subtle vertical ridges running along its length, adding a touch of texture. The base is robust and flat, designed to provide stability when mounted on the ground. The lamp heads are evenly spaced and positioned at the same height, providing balanced illumination to both sides. There are no visible decorative elements, signage, or attachments, emphasizing a functional and contemporary urban design.
description: A modern, dual-headed lamppost with glossy white spherical lamp heads on a slender, dark metallic post and a square base. The design is symmetrical and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing both spherical lamp heads on either side of the horizontal crossbar, with the full height and square base visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the lamppost's narrow profile, with the two lamp heads aligned vertically and the post's ridged texture visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing both lamp heads and the crossbar, with the base and post clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical alignment of the lamp heads and the slenderness of the post.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Glossy white globe with a black circular band, modern and symmetrical.
